headline: MSCI to acquire climate risk data company First Street
summary: Once integrated, First Street's capabilities will be folded into MSCI's existing climate and geospatial tools.

headline: The world’s top-performing stock market still isn’t a developed market. Here’s why, according to the MSCI chief
summary: MSCI CEO Henry Fernandez said South Korea's stock market still falls short of developed market standards.
